skillDefinitions.name: Move Object To
skillDefinitions.description: Move an object to a specific location

properties.name: TargetPosition
properties.description: Target position for moving the object (X, Y, Z, Alpha, Beta, Gamma)

skillDefinitions.name: Move Object To Tag
skillDefinitions.description: Move an object to a predefined location tag

properties.name: TargetTag
properties.description: Target position tag for moving the object

skillDefinitions.name: Move To Position
skillDefinitions.description: Move an object to a specific position in 3D space

properties.name: TargetPosition
properties.description: Target 3D position (X, Y, Z, Alpha, Beta, Gamma)

skillDefinitions.name: Move To Position Tag
skillDefinitions.description: Move an object to a predefined position tag

skillDefinitions.name: Hold Position
skillDefinitions.description: Hold the current end-effector pose for a specified duration

properties.name: Duration
properties.description: How long to hold the current pose in seconds

skillDefinitions.name: Inspect Quality
skillDefinitions.description: Inspect an object and determine if quality is acceptable

properties.name: QualityOK
properties.description: Quality inspection result: true if quality is OK, false if not OK

skillDefinitions.name: Weld
skillDefinitions.description: Weld two metal components together at a joint
